calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Establish Fact, Date, And Place Of Marriage
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Overton (petitioner) in propria persona.
Klaudia Casanova in propria persona.

The court questions what the impetus for this petition is. The parties stated that the wife is doing a name, that they are working on a trust, that they are working on legal matters for the kids, and that they want their marriage to be registered in the United States. The parties also spoke of actions they have taken prior to this petition to get their marriage recognized, spoke of the requirements in Finland, provided copies of authentic documents that were issued in Finald in support of their petition, provided photos of their ceremony, provided names of the people who attended, stated that the authorities/consulate in Mexico would not accept the documents from Finland, that they also want to change the names of their children and have birth certificates issued, that they also had a ceremony here in San Francisco, etc. The court explained the purpose of these petitions, spoke of another procedure that is available in family court (declaration of marriage), spoke of the evidence code requirements, etc. Upon review of the documents and information that was provided by the parties, the court took the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage under submission with the anticipation of granting it.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
